Beartic

#0613 Cubchoo #0615 Cryogonal
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Beartic is an Ice type Pokémon introduced in Generation 5.

Beartic

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0614
Type Ice
Species Freezing Pokémon
Height 2.6 m (8′06″)
Weight 260.0 kg (573.2 lbs)
Abilities 1. Snow Cloak
2. Slush Rush
Swift Swim (hidden ability)
Local № 0120 (Black/White)
0196 (Black 2/White 2)
0082 (X/Y — Mountain Kalos)
0280 (Sword/Shield)
0356 (Scarlet/Violet)
0122 (The Crown Tundra)
0154 (The Indigo Disk)

Training

EV yield 2 Attack
Catch rate 60 (7.8% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 177
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

Base stats

HP 95
300 394
Attack 130
238 394
Defense 80
148 284
Sp. Atk 70
130 262
Sp. Def 80
148 284
Speed 50
94 218
Total 505 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Type defenses

The effectiveness of each type on Beartic.

NorFirWatEleGraIceFigPoiGro
2½2
FlyPsyBugRocGhoDraDarSteFai
22

Evolution chart

#0613
Cubchoo
Ice
(Level 37)
#0614
Beartic
Ice

Beartic changes

  • In Generations 5-6, Beartic does not have the Slush Rush ability.
  • In Generations 5-6, Beartic has a base Attack of 110.
  • In Generations 5-6, Beartic has a base experience yield of 170.
  • In Generations 5-7, Beartic has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Black It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey.
White It freezes its breath to create fangs and claws of ice to fight with. Cold northern areas are its habitat.
Black 2
White 2		 They love the cold seas of the north. They create pathways across the ocean waters by freezing their own breath.
X
Omega Ruby		 They love the cold seas of the north. They create pathways across the ocean waters by freezing their own breath.
Y
Alpha Sapphire		 It freezes its breath to create fangs and claws of ice to fight with. Cold northern areas are its habitat.
Sword It swims through frigid seas, searching for prey. From its frozen breath, it forms icy fangs that are harder than steel.
Shield It swims energetically through frigid seas. When it gets tired, it freezes the seawater with its breath so it can rest on the ice.
Scarlet It is a ferocious, carnivorous Pokémon. Once it captures its prey, it will breathe cold air onto the prey to freeze and preserve it.
Violet Feared as the Snow-White Demon in northern lands, Beartic uses its frosty claws and fangs to attack prey.

Moves learned by Beartic

  • In other generations
  • 5
  • 6
  • 7
  • 8
  • 9
Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Beartic does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Beartic cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Beartic learns the following moves via breeding or picnics in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. Details and compatible parents can be found on the Beartic gen 9 learnset page.
